case.title: 维修厂发布询价、加购物车并下单
case.description: 维修厂账号登录后发布询价，等待报价后加入购物车，进入询价购物车去结算、提交订单并完成支付成功校验。

scenario.title: 发布询价并记录询价单号

test_step.data: (async()=>{const sleep=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const norm=s=>(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,'');const visible=el=>!!el&&el.isConnected&&!!(el.offsetWidth||el.offsetHeight||el.getClientRects().length);const bodyText=()=>document.body&&document.body.innerText?document.body.innerText:'';const click=(el,name)=>{if(!el)throw new Error('未找到'+name);el.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});el.click();};const hasStore=()=>bodyText().includes('已指定：深圳市华砺有限公司')||bodyText().includes('自行指定 (1)');const sys=document.querySelector('#system');if(visible(sys)&&String(sys.className||'').includes('selected')){click(sys,'平台推荐选项');await sleep(200);}const manual=document.querySelector('#manual');if(visible(manual)&&!String(manual.className||'').includes('selected')){click(manual,'自行指定选项');await sleep(300);}if(!hasStore()){click(document.querySelector('.modify-supplier'),'更改指定商家');for(let end=Date.now()+6000;Date.now()<end;){if(hasStore())break;await sleep(250);}if(!hasStore()){const item=[...document.querySelectorAll('#appointSupplierPlugin li,.filter-supplier-item')].filter(visible).find(el=>norm(el.textContent).includes('深圳市华砺有限公司'));click(item,'深圳市华砺有限公司');for(let end=Date.now()+3000;Date.now()<end;){if(hasStore())break;await sleep(250);}}}const close=[...document.querySelectorAll('.close-btn-icon,.close-icon')].filter(visible)[0];if(close){close.click();await sleep(300);}if(!hasStore())throw new Error('发布前未选中深圳市华砺有限公司，页面文本='+bodyText().slice(0,500));click(document.querySelector('.save-inquiry'),'发布询价按钮');return 'manual_supplier_publish_clicked';})()
(()=>{const text=document.body.innerText||'';const m=text.match(/询价单[：:\s]*(B[A-Za-z0-9]+)/)||text.match(/\b(B[A-Za-z0-9]{6,})\b/);if(!m)throw new Error('未提取到B开头询价单号');return m[1];})()

scenario.title: 等待报价、选购并加入购物车

test_step.data: (async()=>{const sleep=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const inquiry='${Return[-1]}';const bodyText=()=>document.body&&document.body.innerText?document.body.innerText:'';const hasDom=()=>bodyText().includes('选购')&&!bodyText().includes('加载中');const j=async(url,opt={})=>{const res=await fetch(url,{credentials:'include',...opt,headers:{'content-type':'application/json',...(opt.headers||{})}});const raw=await res.text();let data={};try{data=JSON.parse(raw);}catch(e){data={raw};}return {ok:res.ok,status:res.status,data,raw};};const quoteCount=v=>{const walk=x=>{if(!x)return 0;if(Array.isArray(x))return x.reduce((s,i)=>s+walk(i),0);if(typeof x==='object'){let n=Array.isArray(x.quotationProducts)?x.quotationProducts.length:0;for(const k of Object.keys(x)){if(k!=='quotationProducts')n+=walk(x[k]);}return n;}return 0;};return walk(v);};const detail=async()=>{const idsRes=await j('/inquiryWeb/'+encodeURIComponent(inquiry)+'/list/userneedsids');const ids=Array.isArray(idsRes.data)?idsRes.data:(idsRes.data&&Array.isArray(idsRes.data.data)?idsRes.data.data:[]);if(!ids.length)return {ok:idsRes.ok,status:idsRes.status,data:{},raw:'needIds empty: '+idsRes.raw};return j('/inquiryWeb/inquiry/detail/'+encodeURIComponent(inquiry),{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify(ids)});};const append=async()=>{const ac=await j('/agentBuy/companies/autoCompleteCompanies?companyName='+encodeURIComponent('深圳市华砺有限公司')+'&pageSize=20&companyType=SUPPLIER');const list=Array.isArray(ac.data)?ac.data:(ac.data&&Array.isArray(ac.data.data)?ac.data.data:[]);const target=list.find(x=>String(x.displayName||x.companyName||'').includes('深圳市华砺有限公司'))||list[0];if(!target)throw new Error('未通过商家自动完成接口找到深圳市华砺有限公司');const storeId=String(target.companyCode||target.productStoreId||target.storeId||'');if(!storeId)throw new Error('深圳市华砺有限公司缺少可提交的companyCode/productStoreId');const res=await j('/agentBuy/inquiry/'+encodeURIComponent(inquiry)+'/appendsuppliers',{method:'POST',body:JSON.stringify([storeId])});if(!(res.ok&&(res.data.code===200||res.data.success||res.data.isSuccess||res.data.data)))throw new Error('追加深圳市华砺有限公司失败，storeId='+storeId+'，status='+res.status+'，响应='+res.raw.slice(0,300));return storeId;};let appended=false,last='';for(let i=0;i<240;i++){if(hasDom())return 'order_detail_ready';if(i%6===0){try{const d=await detail();const c=quoteCount(d.data);last='detail status='+d.status+' quoteCount='+c;if(c>0){return 'quote_data_ready';}if(!appended&&i>=6){appended=true;const sid=await append();last+=' appended='+sid;}}catch(e){last=String(e&&e.message||e);}}await sleep(500);}throw new Error('等待报价超时，未出现选购按钮，inquiry='+inquiry+'，last='+last+'，页面文本='+bodyText().slice(0,200));})()

(async()=>{const sleep=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const bodyText=()=>document.body&&document.body.innerText?document.body.innerText:'';for(let i=0;i<120;i++){const text=bodyText();if(text.includes('选购')&&!text.includes('加载中'))return 'order_detail_ready';await sleep(500);}throw new Error('报价数据已准备但页面未出现选购按钮，页面文本='+bodyText().slice(0,200));})()

(async()=>{const sleep=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));for(let i=0;i<10;i++){const t=document.body.innerText||'';if(/已选择|已选|共\s*1\s*件/.test(t))return 'first_wiper_selected';await sleep(300);}return 'first_wiper_selected_no_summary';})()

(async()=>{const sleep=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const norm=s=>(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,'');const visible=el=>!!el&&el.isConnected&&el.offsetParent!==null;const secondRow=()=>[...document.querySelectorAll('div[class*=quotation-layer--quotation-row]')].find(el=>visible(el)&&(String(el.getAttribute('data-eventdata')||'').includes('"productPartsNum":"571518"')||norm(el.textContent).includes('142.86')));const secondSelected=()=>{const row=secondRow();return !!row&&norm(row.textContent).includes('取消');};const clickSecond=()=>{const row=secondRow();if(!row)throw new Error('未找到第二个雨刮报价行');const btn=[...row.querySelectorAll('button,a,[role=button],span,div')].filter(visible).find(el=>norm(el.textContent)==='选购'&&![...el.children].some(c=>norm(c.textContent).includes('选购')));if(!btn)return false;btn.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});btn.click();return true;};for(let i=0;i<20;i++){if(secondSelected())return 'selected_two_wipers';clickSecond();await sleep(500);if(secondSelected())return 'selected_two_wipers';}throw new Error('第二个雨刮选购后未变为已选择状态');})()

(async()=>{const sleep=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const norm=s=>(s||'').replace(/\s+/g,'');const visible=el=>!!el&&el.isConnected&&el.offsetParent!==null;const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,span,a,div')].filter(visible).find(el=>norm(el.textContent)==='加入购物车'&&!String(el.className||'').includes('Disable'));if(!btn)throw new Error('未找到可点击的加入购物车按钮');btn.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});btn.click();for(let i=0;i<40;i++){const text=document.body.innerText||'';if(text.includes('已加入成功')||text.includes('立即查看')||text.includes('购物车'))return 'add_cart_success';if(text.includes('添加失败')||text.includes('缺货'))throw new Error('加入购物车失败：'+text.slice(0,300));await sleep(250);}return 'add_cart_clicked_no_popover';})()

(async()=>{const sleep=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const inquiry='${Return[-1]}';const bodyText=()=>document.body&&document.body.innerText?document.body.innerText:'';for(let i=0;i<120;i++){const text=bodyText();if(text.includes('询价购物车')&&text.includes(inquiry)&&document.querySelector('.check-single'))return 'cart_page_ready';await sleep(500);}throw new Error('加入购物车后未进入询价购物车页面，inquiry='+inquiry+'，页面文本='+bodyText().slice(0,300));})()

(async()=>{const sleep=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const inquiry='${Return[-1]}';const bodyText=()=>document.body&&document.body.innerText?document.body.innerText:'';const row=[...document.querySelectorAll('tbody.one-inquiry-body,tbody.expired-one-inquiry-body')].find(el=>(el.getAttribute('inquiryid')||'')===inquiry||(el.innerText||'').includes(inquiry));if(!row)throw new Error('未在询价购物车中找到询价单 '+inquiry);const checkAll=row.querySelector('.check-all-inquiry');if(checkAll&&!String(checkAll.className||'').includes('checked')){checkAll.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});checkAll.click();await sleep(500);}const singles=[...row.querySelectorAll('.check-single')];if(singles.some(el=>!el.classList.contains('checked'))){singles.forEach(el=>{if(!el.classList.contains('checked'))el.click();});await sleep(500);}const selectedCount=[...row.querySelectorAll('.check-single.checked')].length;if(selectedCount===0)throw new Error('询价购物车商品未成功选中，页面文本='+bodyText().slice(0,300));return 'cart_items_selected_'+selectedCount;})()

scenario.title: 询价购物车去结算并校验结算页

test_step.data: (async()=>{const sleep=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const inquiry='${Return[-1]}';const bodyText=()=>document.body&&document.body.innerText?document.body.innerText:'';const row=[...document.querySelectorAll('tbody.one-inquiry-body,tbody.expired-one-inquiry-body')].find(el=>(el.getAttribute('inquiryid')||'')===inquiry||(el.innerText||'').includes(inquiry));if(!row)throw new Error('去结算前未找到询价单 '+inquiry);const checkAll=row.querySelector('.check-all-inquiry');if(checkAll&&!String(checkAll.className||'').includes('checked')){checkAll.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});checkAll.click();await sleep(500);}const btn=document.querySelector('#c_go');if(!btn)throw new Error('未找到询价购物车去结算按钮');btn.scrollIntoView({block:'center'});btn.click();for(let i=0;i<120;i++){const text=bodyText();if(text.includes('提交订单'))return 'settle_page_ready';await sleep(500);}throw new Error('点击去结算后未进入结算页，页面文本='+bodyText().slice(0,300));})()

(async()=>{const sleep=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));for(let i=0;i<120;i++){const el=document.querySelector('.total-amount-span');const text=el?(el.innerText||el.textContent||''):(document.body.innerText||'');const clean=String(text||'').replace(/,/g,'');let m=clean.match(/([0-9]+(?:\.[0-9]{1,2})?)/);if(m&&Number(m[1])>0)return Number(m[1]).toFixed(2);const fallback=[...clean.matchAll(/[¥￥]\s*([0-9]+(?:\.[0-9]{1,2})?)/g)].map(x=>Number(x[1])).filter(n=>Number.isFinite(n)&&n>0);if(fallback.length){return fallback.sort((a,b)=>b-a)[0].toFixed(2);}await sleep(500);}throw new Error('结算页未提取到购买商品展示金额，页面文本='+(document.body.innerText||'').slice(0,300));})()

(async()=>{const sleep=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));for(let i=0;i<120;i++){const text=document.body&&document.body.innerText?document.body.innerText:'';if(text.includes('立即支付'))return 'payment_page_ready';await sleep(500);}throw new Error('提交订单后未进入支付页，页面文本='+(document.body.innerText||'').slice(0,300));})()

(()=>{const expected=Number('${Return[-1]}');const text=document.body.innerText||'';const clean=text.replace(/,/g,'');if(!Number.isFinite(expected)||expected<=0)throw new Error('未获取到有效的结算金额');if(clean.includes(expected.toFixed(2)))return expected.toFixed(2);const money=[...clean.matchAll(/[¥￥]\s*([0-9]+(?:\.[0-9]{1,2})?)/g)].map(m=>Number(m[1])).filter(n=>Number.isFinite(n)&&n>0);if(!money.length)return 'payment_success_without_amount';const matched=money.find(n=>Math.round(n*100)===Math.round(expected*100));if(matched)return matched.toFixed(2);throw new Error('支付成功页金额与下单金额不一致，下单金额='+expected.toFixed(2)+'，页面金额='+money.map(n=>n.toFixed(2)).join(','));})()
